metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace publishing the gemini-plugin-cc Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Use Google's Gemini from Claude Code: ask, review, adversarial-review, long-form research via the rescue subagent. Wraps the local @google/gemini-cli with model pinning, env scrubbing, ANSI sanitization, and stop-time review gate.
